title: Decision intelligence is Kage why-memory coverage
summary: Kage decisions should expose the memory native part repo-dashboard-style static maps do not cover: which decisions, gotchas, runbooks, conventions, constraints, and code explanations are grounded to code paths; which important
body: Kage decisions should expose the memory-native part repo-dashboard-style static maps do not cover: which decisions, gotchas, runbooks, conventions, constraints, and code explanations are grounded to code paths; which important files still lack why-memory; and which decision packets are weak or stale. Expose it through CLI, MCP, viewer reports, and docs as .agent_memory/reports/decisions.json.
